scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && vue-tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build:wasm: cd ../pitch-core && (wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../web/public/wasm --features wasm || (cargo install wasm-pack && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../web/public/wasm --features wasm)) || echo 'WASM build skipped or failed'
scripts.build:egui-wasm: cd .. && cargo build -p guitar-tuner-egui --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && (wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir web/public/egui-wasm --out-name guitar_tuner_egui --no-typescript target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/guitar-tuner-egui.wasm || (cargo install wasm-bindgen-cli && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir web/public/egui-wasm --out-name guitar_tuner_egui --no-typescript target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/guitar-tuner-egui.wasm)) || echo 'egui wasm build skipped or failed'
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build && cd ../desktop && npm run tauri build
